ques: Look for a USB-C hub on Amazon compatible with MacBook Pro, featuring at least 4 ports, including HDMI and SD card reader. The price should be under $50. Select the one after sorting by Best Sellers.
answer: Selected the UANTIN USB C Hub 7-in-1 Multiport Adapter (4K HDMI, 100W PD, SD/TF card reader, 3 USB-A — MacBook Pro/Air compatible) at EUR7.48 (under $50), the top result after sorting by Best Sellers.
